expectations.text: Uses plabs scenarios list --demo-active to discover active demos
expectations.evidence: Uses 'plabs status' to find active demos (Step 1), NOT 'plabs scenarios list --demo-active'. The --demo-active flag is never mentioned.

expectations.text: Uses plabs cleanup <id> to remove demo artifacts
expectations.evidence: Step 2 runs 'plabs cleanup <scenario-id>' for each active demo with correct explanation
Explicitly warns against --all and explains why --scenarios-only is correct

notes: Baseline performed relatively well on this eval by reading source code. Main miss: uses plabs status to find active demos rather than the specific --demo-active flag. Used 43k tokens vs 28k with skill.
